description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: build, lint, and check-pr. The build job runs on ubuntu-18.04, installs dependencies, clones DFHack with submodules, sets up the environment, downloads DF, builds and uploads documentation, builds DFHack, and runs tests. The lint job runs on ubuntu-18.04, installs dependencies, clones DFHack, and performs various linting checks. The check-pr job runs on ubuntu-latest for pull requests and checks that the PR base branch is develop.
